reason: Adjusting the ocredit parameter in pam_pwquality only enforces a password complexity rule for new or changed passwords. It does not affect existing authentication mechanisms, services, or system boot, and therefore poses minimal risk of lockout or service disruption.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Users may need to update existing passwords to meet the new special character requirement; If ocredit is set to a positive value, it grants length credit which could slightly reduce effective complexity but does not cause lockout
